# Glossary Template

```markdown
# Domain Glossary

> This glossary defines the canonical terms for the project. All specs, ADRs, work items, and code should use these terms consistently.
>
> **How to use**: When writing or reviewing any artifact, check that domain terms match this glossary. If a term is missing, propose it via the `domain-glossary` skill.

## [Domain Group Name]

| Term | Definition | Status | Aliases to avoid |
|------|-----------|--------|-----------------|
| **[Term]** | [One sentence definition] | [Established/Proposed/Contested] | [Synonyms not to use] |

## Relationships

- A **[Term A]** belongs to exactly one **[Term B]**

## Flagged Ambiguities

- "[word]" was used to mean both **[Term X]** and **[Term Y]**. These are distinct concepts: [explanation].
```
